facts.claim: The cartouche spells the royal name Ptolemy (p-t-w-l-m-y-s).
facts.citation: Champollion, J.-F. (1822), Lettre a M. Dacier relative a l'alphabet des hieroglyphes phonetiques.

facts.claim: The three scripts record one decree, enabling the decipherment.
facts.citation: British Museum, object EA24 (Rosetta Stone), collection record.
